name: Beyond Belief (Agnostic Meeting)

name: 5pm Candlelight Meeting (in-person)
notes:
***NOTE***
The 5 pm Candlelight group will not be able to meet at the Kin Hut, where it normally meets, on Monday July 1st because of Canada Day Celebrations happening at Departure Bay Beach. Instead, we will be meeting in the field of Departure Bay Centennial Park, across the road from the beach, with parking on Wingrove street. It is hoped that there will be lots of room for us to meet there even with the busy festivities at the beach that day. Please bring chairs.

name: ACCESSIBILITY COMMITTEE: Monthly meeting
notes:
⚠This is a service committee monthly meeting, not a recovery meeting
📅 Every month on the First Tuesday.

The Accessibility Committee is responsible to explore, develop and offer resources, including literature, to make the A.A. message and participation in Alcoholics Anonymous available to anyone with special needs. Special needs include, but are not limited to, the deaf and hard of hearing, the developmentally disabled, the mentally and physically challenged, including non-verbal, blind, and partially blind
A.A. members.
Contact the committee at: accessibilities@vancouveraa.ca

name: COMMUNICATIONS COMMITTEE: Monthly meeting
notes:
⚠ This is a subcommittee service monthly meeting, not a recovery meeting.
📅 Meet every month on the second Tuesday

The telephone committee is responsible to ensure that the telephones at the Intergroup office are answered during the hours designated by the Intergroup Committee. The committee consists of Telephone Representatives chosen by groups and other interested members of Alcoholics Anonymous.
You may contact the committee at: communications@vancouveraa.ca

name: TREATMENT COMMITTEE: Monthly meeting
notes:
⚠This is a subcommittee service monthly meeting, not a recovery meeting.
📅 The committee meets every month on the 1st Saturday.

The Treatment Facilities Committee is responsible to ensure meetings and/or panel discussions are held and supported in those detox, hospital, treatment facilities wishing to have such meetings.
